Soil/Rock Description: Decomposed Granite with some fractured Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite with some steel bars and steel fragment. (FILL)

Strong, pinkish grey spotted black and white, slightly to moderately medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced, moderately open, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained kaolin coated joints dipping < 30deg.
moderately strong to strong, pinkish grey spotted black and white, moderately to highly decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE.
